title: Study Statistics
subtitle: We're working on statistics and progress tracking.
streak_desc: Keep it up! Review every day to grow your streak.
no_weak_words: You are doing great! No weak words yet.
no_data: No study data yet. Start studying to see your stats! 🚀
activity_summary: You have had {{count}} hard-working days this month.
goal_hint_progress: You need {{count}} more days to earn a badge.
daily_tip_text: Learning 5 words every day is better than learning 50 words a week! Keep it up.
accuracy_desc: Percentage of correct answers during reviews.
ease_desc: A higher score means you remember words faster.
time_desc: Total time you have spent training.
performance_feedback_great: You are learning very effectively! This accuracy is impressive.
performance_feedback_good: Good job! Keep reviewing to improve your accuracy.
performance_feedback_keep_going: Keep going! The more you learn, the easier words will become.
garden_desc: Where your seeds of knowledge grow every day.
seeds_desc: New words you have just planted.
seedlings_desc: You are remembering these words very well.
trees_desc: Congratulations! You fully own these words.
focus_desc: These are the words you have struggled with the most.
no_weak_words_congrats: Excellent! You have no struggling words.
focus_tip: Tip: Spend 5 minutes a day specifically on this list.
types_desc: Discover how your knowledge is spread across word categories.
insight_noun: You have a rich vocabulary of nouns!
insight_verb: Pay more attention to action verbs.
insight_adj: Adjectives make your speech more vivid.
insight_adv: Adverbs add more clarity to your sentences.
category_summary: You are tracking {{count}} different word categories.
